description: Beta patch: add thread channels, project/global channel scope, linked context, and shared channel event filtering.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(channel): add `polygon channel create --type thread`, `polygon channel post`, `polygon channel threads`, and `polygon channel thread` for durable thread channels.
- feat(channel): add `--scope project|global` resolution across channel create, send, wait, spawn, messages, list, kill, rm, and prune.
- feat(channel): add channel and thread `description` plus `linkedContext` fields via `--linked-context-file` and `--linked-context-raw`.
notes: Run `polygon update` to pull in thread channel commands and project/global scope support. No migration required because existing channel paths and project files remain valid.
